_doc: Global runtime settings. Every tunable lives in config/*.json - no magic numbers in code.

public._doc: Public.com specifics. token_validity_minutes: JWT lifetime requested on exchange (5-1440). max_expirations_per_chain: chain fetches are per-expiration at Public, this caps requests per underlying per scan.

risk._doc: Position sizing for the Review Order flow. max_risk_pct_equity is the % of account equity a single trade may put at risk (long premium = max loss).
